title: broughtonia coccinea
intro: Broughtonia coccinea, also known as the scarlet orchid, is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its vibrant red flowers and slender stems. The medicinal properties of Broughtonia coccinea include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and soothe digestive issues. Broughtonia coccinea is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
